customer.caption: Home — services
customer.title: Services & pickup booking
customer.body: Browse laundry, dry clean, and tailoring in one place. Pin pickup with Places, pick a slot, and confirm — no phone calls.

customer.caption: Live tracking
customer.title: Real-time order timeline
customer.body: Every garment status updates on a live timeline — from shop intake to out for delivery.
services: Map ETA when on the way

customer.caption: Razorpay checkout
customer.title: Secure payments
customer.body: Pay when your order is ready via Razorpay — UPI, cards, and wallets. Card data never touches our servers.

customer.caption: Profile & history
customer.title: Account & preferences
customer.body: Saved addresses, order history, and quick reorders — plus language and notification controls.

provider.caption: Dashboard
provider.title: Offline-first shop dashboard
provider.body: Room-backed local store with WorkManager sync — accept and update orders even when connectivity drops.

provider.caption: Order pipeline
provider.title: Status pipeline
provider.body: Move orders through your shop pipeline in one tap. Customers see every update in real time.

provider.caption: Measurements
provider.title: Intake & measurements
provider.body: Structured tailoring measurements and laundry item logging at intake — fewer mistakes, faster handoff.

provider.caption: Payouts
provider.title: Earnings & settlements
provider.body: Daily earnings, settlement history, and Razorpay payouts straight to your registered bank account.
